records.title: Deal Intake
records.summary: Capture structure, state, target investor count, and notary path.
records.notes: Entry point for underwriting, investor packaging, and legal routing.
records.output: Deal profile and initial contract plan
records.goal: Turn deal facts into the underwriting brief, investor packaging assumptions, and legal workflow.

records.title: Intake Workspace
records.summary: Manage borrower packet collection first, then handle template handoff and draft prep.
records.notes: Main lender console after template selection.
records.output: Borrower packet, draft queue, signature requests
records.goal: Run the live case once the paper stack and investor structure are known: intake, document prep, and signature coordination.

records.title: Borrower Portal
records.summary: Borrower completes forms before investor promotion can be treated as final.
records.goal: Give the borrower one guided place to submit forms and see what is coming next.

records.title: Borrower + Property Validation
records.summary: Validate the borrower, collateral, first-call facts, and screening placeholders before investors see the deal.
records.notes: This is the internal credit and valuation checkpoint that follows borrower packet collection and comes before capital-markets outreach.
records.goal: Confirm the borrower, property, and valuation package is strong enough to send to investors and drive the final capital structure.

records.title: Investor Promotion
records.summary: Summarize the fully collected borrower and underwriting package for investors and lock the final capital stack.
records.notes: Investor promotion should not be treated as complete until the borrower packet is in and the final investor structure is confirmed.
records.output: Investor summary, take-up, and final investor count
records.goal: Package the validated deal for investors and lock the final investor structure before final paper and execution routing.

records.title: Investor Workspace
records.summary: Investor-facing operating lane for promotion, updates, and exit communication.
records.notes: This is the ongoing investor relationship surface.
records.goal: Keep investors aligned from commitment through servicing and exit.

records.title: Template Selection
records.summary: Pick the lead precedent by state, structure, and final investor shape.
records.notes: Drive the case from an approved starting paper once the capital structure is known.
records.goal: Select the most defensible starting paper for this deal shape, jurisdiction, and final investor stack.

records.title: Contract AI Review
records.summary: Run clause, state-pack, and structure checks.
records.goal: Catch missing clauses, structural mismatches, and state-pack gaps before legal sign-off.

records.title: Legal Review
records.summary: Lawyer comments, approval, and signature clearance.
records.output: Approved paper stack or correction request
records.goal: Create a hard human approval gate before any borrower-facing signature action.

records.title: Closing Diligence
records.summary: Clear title work, insurance, and tax in a separate diligence gate before execution.
records.notes: Title company and closing diligence gate.
records.goal: Separate title, insurance, and tax diligence from document review so execution is only cleared when both gates are done.

records.title: Google Signature
records.summary: Non-notary e-sign lane after legal approval.
records.notes: Execution lane once legal and diligence are clear.
records.output: Tracked signature request and final signed docs
records.goal: Send approved documents into the Google signature lane and track them through execution.

records.title: Funding
records.summary: Set up escrow, reserve policy, and release conditions before money moves.
records.goal: Move from approved paper into escrow, reserves, and final funding release.

records.title: Servicing + Updates
records.summary: Track monthly payments, reserve balance, and investor updates after funding.
records.goal: Keep the post-close performance story visible month by month.

records.title: Exit / Payoff / Rollover
records.summary: Run payoff, extension, refinance, sale, or rollover as an explicit workflow.
records.goal: Make the end of the deal as structured and visible as the beginning.

records.title: Notary / RON
records.notes: Future branch for state-specific notarization workflows.
records.goal: Break notarized documents out of the normal e-sign lane so compliance is explicit.
